nasb.text: Immediately the flow of her blood was dried up; and she felt in her body that she was healed of her affliction.

esv.text: And immediately the flow of blood dried up, and she felt in her body that she was healed of her disease.

cnv.text: 於是她血漏的源頭立刻乾了，她在身體上感覺到病已經得了醫治。

ccb.text: 她的血漏立刻停止了，她感到自己痊愈了。

csbs.text: 立刻，她的血漏就止住了，她也感觉到身体从病痛中痊愈了。
